programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. programme.title: Circle Abang Cilok Mood Banget
programme.desc: Bang Toyib is always bothered by Sumi. Sumi daringly lies to her father, claiming that she is pregnant and that Bang Toyib is the one who got her pregnant. However, Bang Toyib continues to deny that he ever impregnated Sumi. What happens next?

programme.title: Memancing Cinta Di Kolam Hati Neng Mawar
programme.desc: Mawar returned to her village to celebrate becoming a makeup artist and wanted to buy a very large fishing pond for her father. Meanwhile, Mawar confessed to her father that the hundreds of millions of rupiah she had brought with her had been stolen. Mawar accused Juan of stealing her money. However, it turned out that Juan was a wealthy man who owned the fishing pond that Mawar wanted to buy.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3

programme.title: Es Kul Kul Varian Orang Lama Pemenangnya
programme.desc: Sisil, the seller of kul kul ice, is sharing her feelings. Reluctantly, she goes along with Bimo's evil plan after her cart was taken by the municipal police.
